stemHtml: A radio signal may be classified by three symbols in accordance with the ITU radio regulation e.g. A1A. Which statement is true?

options.a: The first symbol indicates the type of modulation of the main carrier
options.b: The three symbols together indicate which device is transmitting on the carrier
options.c: The second symbol indicates the nature of information to be transmitted
options.d: The third symbol indicates the nature of the signal modulating the main carrier
